description_long: This is a lifelike domestic cat with a slender, athletic build and a long, upright tail. Its fur is predominantly orange with darker tabby stripes running along its body, legs, and tail, and it has white fur on its paws, chest, and underbelly. The cat's face is expressive, with alert, forward-facing ears, bright yellow eyes, and a pink nose. Its posture is attentive and standing, as if it is pausing mid-step or observing its surroundings. The fur appears soft and short, with a matte finish and subtle sheen. No collar or accessories are visible on the cat.
description: A realistic orange tabby cat with white paws and chest, standing alert with an upright tail and expressive yellow eyes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat's face, yellow eyes, pink nose, and white chest and paws.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange tabby stripes, white paws, and the full length of the upright tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and tail, with visible tabby striping and white underbelly.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the tabby pattern, white paws, and the cat's attentive stance.
attribute_fur_pattern: tabby, orange with darker stripes and white markings
